Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Southbound Reroute near Cicero/Milwaukee
ShortDescription: Southbound #54 Cicero buses are temp. rerouted via Cicero, Montrose, Milwaukee, and Cicero, then into the terminal due to street blockage near Cicero/Milwaukee.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Southbound #54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero, Montrose, Milwaukee, and Cicero, then into the terminal.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Cicero/Milwaukee.

(Revised)

Headline: #54A North Cicero/Skokie Blvd Temporary Southbound Reroute near Cicero/Milwaukee
ShortDescription: SB #54A North Cicero/Skokie Blvd. buses are temp. rerouted via Cicero, Montrose, Milwaukee, Irving Park and Cicer due to street blockage near Cicero/Milwaukee.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Southbound #54A North Cicero/Skokie Blvd. buses are temporarily rerouted via Cicero, Montrose, Milwaukee, Irving Park and Cicero, then resume their normal route.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Cicero/Milwaukee.
